name: Manifest — Smart LLM Router
description: Smart model routing, cost tracking, and usage analytics for your OpenClaw agent. Zero-config local dashboard included.
author: MNFST Inc.

mode.description: Run mode: 'cloud' (default) or 'local' for embedded server. 'dev' is deprecated — use devMode instead.

devMode.description: Enable for development: skips API key validation. Auto-detected when endpoint is localhost without an API key.

apiKey.description: Your Manifest API key (starts with mnfst_). Not required in local mode.

port.description: Port for the local embedded server (local mode only)

host.description: Bind address for the local embedded server (local mode only)

mode.label: Mode
mode.description: Choose 'cloud' to route through app.manifest.build (default), or 'local' for a self-contained server with sql.js

devMode.label: Dev Mode
devMode.description: Enable for development: skips API key validation
